channel.title: code on Linus Torvalds
channel.description: Recent content in code on Linus Torvalds

item.title: svelte.js 登录示例代码
item.description: <script> import { onMount } from 'svelte'; import { db } from './pocketbase.js'; let username = ''; let password = ''; let error = ''; onMount(async () => { try { await db.open(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } }); async function handleSubmit() { try { const user = await db.getUser(username); if (!user) { error = '用户名不存在'; return; } if (user.password !== password) { error = '密码不正确'; return; } // 登录成功的代码 error = ''; } catch (e) { console.
